title: Ventura Sidebar · Epic Hero in Live Preview
thesis: A Ventura-style category sidebar where 'Live Preview' is the first row. When no site is booted, Live Preview holds a cinematic Epic hero (one decisive LAUNCH verb + the active blueprint's poster). The instant a playground boots, the hero crossfades to the WordPress iframe at the exact same coordinates. Categories below (Site Manager, Blueprint, Database, Logs) each swap the single content pane — same surface, one door per feature. A small CWS pill in the top-right corner of the iframe reports live status and doubles as the one-click fullscreen trigger.
